notes: NN/g authoritative source, widely cited methodology

claim_text: GitHub Copilot Workspace uses current-state vs desired-state specification format

claim_text: INVEST criteria (Independent Negotiable Valuable Estimable Small Testable) define story quality

claim_text: 3-7 acceptance criteria per story is the recommended range
notes: Multiple sources converge on this range
